etymology.description: semantic 言(言) (yán, "speech") + phonetic 式(式) (shì) -> test or experiment
etymology.interpretation: The character 試(試) (shì, "test; experiment") is a phono-semantic compound, with 言(言) (yán, "speech") providing the semantic element related to 'speaking' or 'words', and 式(式) (shì) offering the phonetic aspect. The idea of 'testing' or 'experimenting' can be associated with the concept of using words or speech to probe or evaluate something.
etymology.simplification: Simplified from 試 by replacing 言(言) (yán, "speech") with 讠, reducing strokes while keeping the phonetic element 式(式) (shì).

examples.chinese: 我想试一下这件衣服(我想試一下這件衣服)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng shì yīxià zhè jiàn yīfu.
examples.english: I want to try on this piece of clothing.

examples.chinese: 科学家们正在进行一个新的实验(科學家們正在進行一個新的實驗)。
examples.pinyin: Kēxuéjiāmen zhèngzài jìnxíng yī gè xīn de shíyàn.
examples.english: Scientists are conducting a new experiment.

examples.chinese: 他决定冒个险试一试(他決定冒個險試一試)。
examples.pinyin: Tā juédìng mào gè xiǎn shì yī shì.
examples.english: He decided to take a risk and give it a try.
